title: rubus mulleri subsp. jactuosus
intro: Rubus mulleri subsp. jactuosus, also known as Jactuosus Raspberry or a variant of the Western Raspberry, is a lesser-known sub-species within the Rubus mulleri species, which is native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus mulleri subsp. jactuosus include its potential to help reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
